decisions.cutover_impact: Private execution cannot enter the included cutover set until the Hermes runtime contract is proven.
Generated Hermes profiles must be pinned, reproducible, and relay-owned before cutover.
Cron and background workflows cannot cut over until duplicate delivery and resume semantics are proven.
Social workflows cannot cut over until workspace, memory, network, and identity isolation are proven.
Provider-backed workflows cannot cut over until relay-proxy routing and signed write approvals are preserved.
Public-channel workflows cannot cut over until webhook delivery, retries, and identity binding are proven.
No workflow enters production until the first complete included set is explicitly accepted.
Hermes model traffic must route through Telclaude-owned relay boundaries before production use.
